creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 170807
Updated opensmtpd-devel diff

Hi,

Thanks for the update diff. It looks good, and works fine on 10.3-RELEASE (amd64). I have added a statement to `post-patch' target, where I update SMTPD_VERSION (in $wrksrc/smtpd/smtpd.h) to reflect the actual snapshot version. Right now, it says, 5.9.1p1 which is not correct. I have posted about it[1] to upstream list.

Once I am done doing build tests on platforms I have access to, I will commit it.

Please let me know if you have any questions.

References:
[1] http://thread.gmane.org/gmane.mail.opensmtpd.general/3583/focus=3614 

Thanks!
